'''鈭歴-z-ng-v''' ('''kasazngevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagrate|vagrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagrate|vagrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-z-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasazngevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazngevoko|thisazngevoko]] || [[word:jisazngevoko|jisazngevoko]] || [[word:shisazngevoko|shisazngevoko]] || [[word:kisazngevoko|kisazngevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
